title: Project Coordinator
description:
Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Liaise with authorities and customers on work programmes, service activities, and safety matters, including drafting of service orders and quotations.

  • Assist in project administration, coordination, and daily operational activities.

  • Plan and allocate manpower, vehicles, and equipment to ensure smooth and efficient service operations.

  • Conduct site inspections, supervise work progress, and ensure work quality during execution and upon completion.

  • Ensure all worksites comply with Workplace Safety & Health (WSH) and environmental policies; identify safety issues and enforce safety compliance.

  • Carry out risk assessments, conduct incident investigations, and recommend preventive and corrective measures to minimise risks.

  • Conduct and lead safety-related briefings, toolbox meetings, and safety inspections.

  • Ensure project documentation (both hardcopy and softcopy) is properly filed and that records are accurate and up to date.

  • Implement and maintain documentation for quality management systems, including ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001, ensuring compliance with applicable legislation and regulations.

Requirements:

  • Fresh graduates are welcome to apply!

  • Good interpersonal and communication skills.

  • Positive work attitude; self-driven team player with the ability to work independently.

  • Able to commence work immediately or within short notice will be an added advantage.

  • 5.5-day work week.

postedCompany.description:
KWONG NGEE ENGINEERING PTE LTD

Since 1968 , Kwong Ngee Engineering has been providing comprehensive maintenance and rectification services to oil majors naming Shell Eastern Petroleum, ExxonMobil (previously Esso and Mobil), Chevron (previously Caltex), British Petroleum (BP) and Singapore Petroleum Company to upkeep operational and readiness to their service stations' and its fuelling site facilities. Fifty years in the petroleum & oil industry and our unrelenting zeal to provide customers with quality work and services, Kwong Ngee Engineering Pte Ltd have established as one of the leading service provider in the fuel retailing sector.


The business covers multiple fields of engineering works involving civil, electrical, electronics and mechanical services. We provide it with an establishment of multiple disciplines, well equipped trained personnel to manage and handle any disruptive situation at our customer's network, so as to minimise downtime and protect their brand image. These services are supported by a central operations and technical center, a call center for customers and a network of operations to provide greater flexibility, faster response to changes and a faster turnaround time for job completion.


We are dedicated to continuous improvement in our service standards and reliability through constant skills upgrade of our staff and employing the use of cutting edge equipment. In our business with the oil majors, we are constantly reviewing and improving our set up and engineering practices to suit their service requirements. Here in Kwong Ngee Engineering, we work along with customers to explore improvement practices to provide with value-added programs to their fuel dispensing businesses.
postedCompany.name: KWONG NGEE ENGINEERING PTE LTD
